blockers: Direct site navigation was refused by the browser's security policy.
Search engines returned no indexed pages, product descriptions, pricing, checkout information, or API documentation for driftflight.com.
The public ZeroClick marketplace search failed, so no listing or payable endpoint could be verified.
Passive DNS and certificate records revealed api, agents, pay, and demo subdomains, but did not establish their functionality, pricing, payment protocol, or human-gate requirements.
trust_events: The browser explicitly blocked driftflight.com under its site-safety policy, so direct investigation was discontinued without attempting a bypass.
WHOIS showed the domain was created on 2026-07-16, only seven days before this investigation, and it had no meaningful indexed web presence; this would warrant warning the user before any purchase.
notes: End-to-end agent purchasing could not be established. Passive records show Cloudflare hosting and recent certificates for driftflight.com, api.driftflight.com, pay.driftflight.com, demo.driftflight.com, and agents.driftflight.com; the agents hostname points toward ZeroClick infrastructure. These are only architectural hints and are insufficient to mark any checkpoint true.
